ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutes" (
  "inst_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "inst_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the institution */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the institution */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inst_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "department_code" INTEGER /* Code of the department offering the branch */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in years */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree offered (e.g., BTech, BSc) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotas" (
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quota */,
  "quota_name" TEXT /* Name of the quota */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quota */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the quota */,
  "gov_policy_ref" TEXT /* Reference to the government policy defining the quota */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quota_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "subcategories" TEXT /* Subcategories within the main category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_quotas" (
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quota */,
  "inst_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "branch_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "vacancies" INTEGER /* Number of vacancies for the quota */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year for which the quota is applicable */,
  "reserved_seats" INTEGER /* Number of reserved seats within the quota */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quota_id", "inst_code", "branch_code", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student applying */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student applying */,
  "student_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the student */,
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quota */,
  "inst_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "branch_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_quota_id FOREIGN KEY ("quota_id") REFERENCES quotas ("quota_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_inst_code FOREIGN KEY ("inst_code") REFERENCES institutes ("inst_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_branch_code FOREIGN KEY ("branch_code") REFERENCES branches ("branch_code")
)
column_names: Code of the department offering the branch
Duration of the course in years
Type of degree offered (e.g., BTech, BSc)
Reference to the government policy defining the quota
Number of vacancies for the quota
Academic year for which the quota is applicable
Number of reserved seats within the quota
Current status of the application (Pending, Approved, Rejected)
